name: platty-mcp
description: Platty MCP retrieval, memory, and SDD handoff skills for configured remote context servers.

interface.shortDescription: Platty MCP retrieval, memory, and SDD handoffs
interface.longDescription: Use Platty MCP skills to search and read already configured remote Platty context, documents, specs, SSOT, glossary terms, memory overlays, and status, explicitly manage Platty memories through MCP, or produce MCP-grounded SDD handoffs for local Platty SDD persistence, without running local CLI lifecycle commands.
defaultPrompt: Search my configured Platty MCP context.
